message: Come on in. How can I help you?
Can you tell me about what you do?

I am a school psychologist.  It’s my job to help students with their education and learning needs. When teachers and parents need help understanding how students learn, I mainly figure this out through assessments, then make recommendations for what teachers, parents, and students can do to improve their learning.
I didn't know that was a job.
It's rewarding to help students with their learning.
